content5.ptxt: The tire pressure warning valve and transmitters that are installed in the tire and wheel assemblies measure the air pressure of the tires. The measured values are transmitted to the tire pressure warning antenna and receiver on the body as radio waves and then sent to the tire pressure warning ECU. The ECU compares the measured air pressure values with the air pressure threshold. When the measured air pressure value is less than this threshold, the warning light in the combination meter comes on.
When the internal circuit of the tire pressure warning valve and transmitter is malfunctioning, this DTC is output.

entry.ptxt: If an "ERROR" signal is received 3 times consecutively, the tire pressure warning valve and transmitter will be judged as defective and a DTC will be output.

This will happen in situations where the inflation pressure is outside the range 0 to 637.5 kPa (0 to 6.48 kgf/cm2, 0 psi to 92.2 psi), the temperature inside the tire is outside the specified range -40 to 120°C (-40 to 253°F), or an error occurs in the tire pressure warning valve and transmitter or the surrounding area.

item.ptxt: Tire pressure warning valve and transmitter
It is necessary to perform the procedure to identify the tire pressure warning valve and transmitter that is malfunctioning because it cannot be identified by the output DTC.
DTC 2145/45 is used only when the vehicle is equipped with full-size spare tire.
When replacing the tire pressure warning ECU, read the IDs stored in the ECU using the intelligent tester and write them down before removal.

It is necessary to perform initialization (See page ) after registration (See page ) of the transmitter IDs into the tire pressure warning ECU after the ECU and/or valve and transmitter has been replaced.

test1.ptxt: Set the tire pressure to the specified value.
*2: For driving at 100 mph (160 km/h) or over
Display the "TIREPRESS" data for each wheel using the intelligent tester.

Rapidly reduce the tire pressure for each wheel at least 40 kPa (0.41 kg/cm2, 5.8 psi) within 30 seconds. If "TIREPRESS" displayed on the tester (ID1 to ID4 or ID5) does not change, the tire pressure warning valve and transmitter corresponds to the DTC that was detected.

item.ptxt: Identify the malfunctioning tire pressure warning valve and transmitter by repeatedly decreasing the tire pressure for each tire.
Record which "TIREPRESS" data (ID1 to ID4 or ID5) corresponds to each tire.

entry.ptxt: min.: 0 kPa (0 kgf/cm2, 0 psi), max.: 637.5 kPa (6.48 kgf/cm2, 92.2 psi)
min.: 0 kPa (0 kgf/cm2, 0 psi), max.: 637.5 kPa (6.48 kgf/cm2, 92.2 psi)
min.: 0 kPa (0 kgf/cm2, 0 psi), max.: 637.5 kPa (6.48 kgf/cm2, 92.2 psi)
min.: 0 kPa (0 kgf/cm2, 0 psi), max.: 637.5 kPa (6.48 kgf/cm2, 92.2 psi)
min.: 0 kPa (0 kgf/cm2, 0 psi), max.: 637.5 kPa (6.48 kgf/cm2, 92.2 psi)
One of "TIREPRESS" data (ID1 to ID4 or ID5) changed.

item.ptxt: When "TIREPRESS" data has not changed, reset the tire pressure to the appropriate specified value and rotate the tire 90 to 270 degrees. Then forcibly transmit the transmitter ID and recheck.
Record the transmitter ID and position of transmitters that are normal.

test1.ptxt: When the "TIREPRESS" data (ID1 to ID4 or ID5) has changed, repeat this procedure to identify the tire pressure warning valve and transmitter that corresponds to a DTC.
When all of the "TIREPRESS" data (ID1 to ID4 or ID5) have changed, identify the malfunctioning tire pressure warning valve and transmitter using recorded ID numbers and output DTC.
Set the tire pressures to the appropriate specified values.

testgrp.testtitle: REPLACE TIRE PRESSURE WARNING VALVE AND TRANSMITTER

test1.ptxt: Replace the identified tire pressure warning valve and transmitter with a new one.

item.ptxt: Before installing a new tire pressure warning valve and transmitter, read and write down its transmitter ID.
The IDs for the tire pressure warning valve and transmitter not be replaced should be checked using the tester and recorded.

test1.ptxt: Register the transmitter ID for all wheels (See page ).
Set the tire air pressure of all wheels to the specified value (For the specified value, see step 1).

entry.ptxt: Any of the DTCs from C2141/41 to C2144/44 or C2145/45 are output.
Any of the DTCs from C2141/41 to C2144/44 or C2145/45 are not output.
